title: Bigger animals
description: A resource pack that makes most animals slightly fatter
body:
This mod makes most animals in the game slightly fatter, this required optifine or any other mod that mimics optifines CEM feature, like [custom entity models](https://modrinth.com/mod/cem) or [entity model features](https://modrinth.com/mod/entity-model-features) entity model features also requires [entity texture features](https://modrinth.com/mod/entitytexturefeatures)

Join the [Discord!](https://discord.gg/p6ShJPq98d) where this mod was even requested! You can ask for help, a mod, just suggest something, hangout or request the source code of any mod I have made (if I still have the source code)

Or donate to my [Kofi](https://ko-fi.com/bikerboys) incase you are feeling generous!
